---
name: False positive/negative
about: Report a site giving a false positive/negative result.
title: False positive/negative
labels: false positive/negative
assignees: OSINTI4L

---

It should be noted that if your ISP, VPN, or proxy provider is blocking certain adult platforms in your region it will cause cupidcr4wl to return false positives. Please ensure this is not the reason you are receiving a false positive/negative prior to submitting an issue.

1. What is the name of the site?

2. What is the URL of the site?

3. Is it displaying a false positive or negative?

4. Additional comments (if any):
